programmes.show_description: No Other Love: Detective drama series. Frost investigates two domestic cases - one tragically straightforward and the other cruelly deceptive - which are solved at a terrible cost.
The Canteen Girl: Enduring '70s British sitcom. Stan and Jack tease Inspector Blake when they are amused at the attention showered on new canteen girl Molly by their superior.
Shopping from home.
Four and Twenty Blackbirds: Drama series about a Cornish police detective. Wycliffe is summoned to trace a farmer who has disappeared.
Happy Families: Drama series. When a schoolgirl is found dead in a science lab after a school disco, Wycliffe sets out to discover whether it's a case of murder or suicide.
Dark Matter: When the master of a college is found dead at the foot of its observatory's stairs, suspicion falls on all of the staff from senior tutors right down to its scouts.
Endless Night: While staying with a recently widowed friend, Miss Marple meets charming drifter Mike Rogers. Events then take a sinister turn when a dangerous killer strikes...
Orpheus in the Undergrowth: Light-hearted drama series. Laura is planning to construct a memorial garden near her daughter's home when the body of an alcoholic is found at the site.
They Understand Me in Paris: Drama series about two gardeners who are amateur sleuths. The duo are restoring the gardens of a French villa when their host's husband is found dead.
The Debt of Lies: When the latest resident of a police retirement community is found dead, the tight-knit group regard a murder on their doorstep as both an affront and a challenge.
A Grain of Truth: The world of organic baking begins to crumble after a series of incidents at the newly-revamped Larkton's Mill.
Dressed to Kill: When drag queens sashay into the village of Elverton-cum-Latterly, they are ostracised when their charity event clashes with an annual dominoes competition.
Dead in the Water: Barnaby and Scott dig into the luxury lifestyles of the rowing set when the annual Midsomer Regatta is brought to a standstill after a body is found in a river.
Cuckoo: DCI Vera Stanhope is called to the tragic scene of an unidentified teenage boy found dead in a sleepy coastal town.
Dancing in the Dark: Police drama series. Pole dancers, false passports and murder make for a lethal combination that draws Frost and his new assistant into a tragic case.
The Other Woman: '70s sitcom about a bus company. Olive is furious when Arthur flirts with a brassy-looking conductress at a busmen's darts match and then fails to come home.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Wild Oats: Detective drama series. An archaeological dig uncovers a 30-year-old skeleton that seems to unsettle a local landowning family.
Breaking Point: Detective drama series. Wycliffe is called in when a surfer is washed up on a beach with head injuries. Starring Jack Shepherd.
Your Sudden Death Question: Lewis and Hathaway are called in when a top quiz competitor is found floating dead in the fountain of an Oxford college on a bank holiday weekend.
Scherzo: Crime drama. It's the summer of 1971, and Endeavour and the team are called to investigate the murder of a cab driver found dead in his taxi on the outskirts of Oxford.
The Holly Bears a Prickle: Comedy-drama series. Martin and Louisa go out on their first date, but the clumsy doctor cannot help but ruin the occasion with an inappropriate remark.
Nowt So Queer: Comedy-drama series. The village is buzzing with news of the engagement of Martin and Louisa, and Al decides to take action to save his dad Bert's restaurant business.
The Invisible Worm: Light-hearted drama series. Rosemary and Laura are caught up in a strange ritual when they visit a preparatory school to investigate why its roses are dying.
The Gongoozlers: Light-hearted drama series. Laura teams up with a yachtswoman-turned-TV presenter to investigate when Rosemary is injured in a suspicious filming accident.
Detective drama series. Peak wedding season in Bath results in a race against time for the duo when a spate of suspicious deaths affects ceremonies across the city.
The Body in the Library: Miss Marple is called by an old friend to help discover who strangled a young dancer in the library of Gossington Hall.
Orchis Fatalis: When one of the world's rarest orchids is smuggled illegally into Midsomer Malham, it triggers a catalogue of passion, jealousy and death.
Cold River: Crime drama. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates when a beauty empire is shaken to the ground after one of three sisters is found dead in the River Tyne.
